description: Interactive animator that transforms a line from its current state to a target line
utility: Animate line transformations or movements with play/reset control

arguments.name: sourceLine
arguments.description: Variable reference to an existing line to animate

arguments.name: targetLine
arguments.description: Target line expression (can be inline or variable reference)

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional styling: c(), s(), t(), defer(), etc.

examples.scenario: Animate a line segment to a new position
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
line_1 = line(G, point(G, -3, -2), point(G, 1, 2), type(segment))
line_2 = line(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 5, 5), type(segment))
lnanim_1 = lineanimator(line_1, line_2)

G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
line_2 = line(G, point(G, -2, 1), point(G, 3, 4), type(segment))
lnanim_1 = lineanimator(line_2, line(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 5, 5)))
